description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-06-21T20:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 22 June 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p.m. and 7:30 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p.m. and 8:00 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a.m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a.m. is cancelled
2026-06-21T20:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年6⽉22⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 23 June 2026:
Park Island Transport Company Limited
'Ma Wan - Central' Route:
- Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p.m. and 7:30 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p.m. and 8:00 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route:
- Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a.m. is cancelled
- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a.m. is cancelled.

「⾺灣-中環」航線：
-⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運

2026-07-09T17:53:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following High Speed Rail train trips will be cancelled due to adverse weather conditions: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shanghai Hongqiao Station: G900 From Shanghai Hongqiao Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G899 For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306.cn). You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For ticket refunds, please refer to the High Speed Rail website and process within the time stated. Please use the 12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app and there is no need to rush to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2026-07-09T17:53:00.CONTENT_CN: 中國內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，下列高速鐵路列車車次取消： 由香港西九龍站前往上海虹橋站：G900 由上海虹橋站前往香港西九龍站：G899 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。 如需退票，請參閱高速鐵路網頁並於指定日期內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。

2026-07-10T22:01:00.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following High Speed Rail train trips will be cancelled due to adverse weather conditions:

10 Jul：
From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shanghai Hongqiao Station：G900
From Shanghai Hongqiao Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G899

11 Jul：

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shanghai Hongqiao Station：G900
From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Fuzhou Station：G920, G924
From Shanghai Hongqiao Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G899
From Fuzhou Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G919, G923

12 Jul：

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shanghai Hongqiao Station：G900
From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Fuzhou Station：G920
From Shanghai Hongqiao Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G899
From Fuzhou Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G919

For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306.cn) on the mobile app. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.

For ticket refunds, please refer to the High Speed Rail website and process within the time stated. Please use the 12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app and there is no need to rush to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2026-07-10T22:01:00.CONTENT_CN:
中國內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，下列高速鐵路列車車次取消：

7月10日：

由香港西九龍站前往上海虹橋站：G900
由上海虹橋站前往香港西九龍站：G899

7月11日：

由香港西九龍站前往上海虹橋站：G900
由香港西九龍站前往福州站：G920,G924
由上海虹橋站前往香港西九龍站：G899
由福州站前往香港西九龍站：G919,G923

7月12日：
由香港西九龍站前往上海虹橋站：G900
由香港西九龍站前往福州站：G920
由上海虹橋站前往香港西九龍站：G899
由福州站前往香港西九龍站：G919

有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。市民亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

如需退票，請參閱高速鐵路網頁並於指定日期內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。
